description: Multi-step warehouse-native pipeline compiled to one CTE-CTAS plan per sink. YAML-defined stored-procedure shape.

outputs.description: One or more materialized tables (one per sink)

source.description: Flat shape (one source, one ops chain, one sink): {upstream_table: 'schema.table'} or {kind: table|sql, ...}. Use 'steps' for multi-source.

operations.description: Flat shape: ordered ops applied to 'source'. Supported ops: filter, with_columns, select, drop, group_by, sort, limit, top_n, top_n_per_group, dedup, distinct, union, join, sql.

steps.description: Multi-step form. Each step: {id, source: {kind: table|ref|sql, ...}, operations: [...]}. Use 'ref' to consume an earlier step. Use 'op: sql' for raw-SQL escape (supports <<self>> and <<step_id>> placeholders).

sinks.description: Multi-step form. Each sink: {from: <step_id>, table: 'schema.table', mode: replace|create_if_not_exists}.
